channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Apple CEO affirms company's secrecy, pleasing investors
item.description: A morning briefing of key business and market news.

item.title: SEON CEO on prediction markets: Forecasting the future?
item.description: The growth of prediction markets has exceeded regulatory oversight. Upcoming CFTC rulemaking will be crucial.

item.title: Starbucks Turnaround: Focus on Employee Treatment
Researcher uses fruit flies to study cancer
item.description: Biomedical scientist Caíque Costa studies cancer using fruit flies. He developed his first prototype with everyday materials.
